title: Block Island
description: This is a Modpack for a minecraft vanilla world with some upgrades.
body:
This is a Modpack for a vanilla world with some upgrades. Play it and have fun. The Modpack add new blocks, items, Mobs and secruity blocks. 
Alex Mobs: Add many cool Mobs and Items.
Simple Voice Chat: Talk with your friends in game.
Corpse: Create a Corpse when you die with your loot in it.
Supplementaries: Add many Blocks and Items that helpfully.
Carry on: You can carry some blocks and mobs.
Just enought Items: view the recipes of all items.
Secruity Craft: Add Secruity blocks: mines, passcode blocks and much more.
Iron furnaces: Upgrade your furnaces.
